---
title: "Curriculum Vitae"
---

[Download my CV](files/Molligo_CV.pdf){.btn .btn-primary}

<object
  data="files/molligo-cv.pdf"
  type="application/pdf"
  width="100%"
  height="900px">
  <p>
    Your browser cannot display the PDF.
    <a href="files/Molligo_CV.pdf">Download the CV instead.</a>
  </p>
</object>
